name: valorize-plus
description: Valorize+ - plataforma financeira comportamental com web desktop, API Node e app mobile Expo.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,web,mobile -c green,cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:mobile"
